intro: Urban Sport is positioned as a sponsor-ready platform with premium club visibility, tournament cadence, and year-round digital presence.
featureCopy: Urban Sport combines club discovery, event hosting, tournament circulation, and community-led brand moments. Partnership visibility scales from campaign moments to season-long presence.

tiers.name: Title tier
tiers.description: Calendar naming rights, major event presence, and premium homepage visibility.

tiers.name: Official tier
tiers.description: Tournament support, venue visibility, draw-stage branding, and member touchpoints.

tiers.name: Community tier
tiers.description: Grassroots presence, academy support, and event-linked campaign slots.
